{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Vault (The Last Horizon)
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Vault claims that following her would be the easiest path.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23">''The Pilot'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“The easiest path would be to follow me now.”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
